message: Hi, I tried logging in this morning and keep getting a 403 error. My account is arcvault.io/user/jsmith. This started after your update last Tuesday.
We'd love to see a bulk export feature for our audit logs. We're a compliance-heavy org and this would save us hours every month.
Invoice #8821 shows a charge of $1,240 but our contract rate is $980/month. Can someone look into this?
I'm not sure if this is the right place to ask, but is there a way to set up SSO with Okta? We're evaluating switching our auth provider.
Your dashboard stopped loading for us around 2pm EST. Checked our end - it's definitely on yours. Multiple users affected.

subject: Refund request
message: We canceled last week but still see invoice #9929 for $85 on our corporate card. Please reverse it.

subject: CSV upload failing
message: Error code ERR-104 appears when importing users for account ID AC-4438. The failure started today.
Is there a way to export all invoices for Q1 into a CSV file?

subject: Possible security concern
message: We noticed unfamiliar logins from overseas IPs on arcvault.io/user/admin. Please confirm whether this is a breach.

subject: Dashboard slow
message: The analytics dashboard takes 20-30 seconds to load for one admin user, but the rest of the app works.
